item.title:

item.description:
Binance Online: Setting the Stage. May 6 | 13:00 UTC
Livestream with Chromia, Epic, Fusionist, Pixels, and Zerobase
Get a first look at the agenda, speakers, and activations plus 2,000 USDC in red packets.
Set your reminder → https://t.co/oFiuFJgNw9 https://t.co/5W7pPlmqCc
--- @binance | ❤️ 64 | 🔁 8 | 💬 26 | 👁 5422
